description: Manages employee master data, organizational structures, and HR processes including hiring, transfers, and terminations.

entityTypes.name: Employee
entityTypes.description: Represents a single employee in the HR system. Contains identification, personal data, job assignment, and employment status.

properties.name: EmployeeId
properties.description: The globally unique identifier assigned to the employee by the HR system. Immutable after creation.

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.description: The formatted full name of the employee used in UI surfaces and reports.

complexTypes.name: AddressInfo
complexTypes.description: Contains street, city, postal code, and country components for an employee address.

properties.name: Country
properties.description: Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the address.

entitySets.name: Employees
entitySets.description: Read and manage employee master records. Supports filtering by status, department, and location.

enumTypes.name: EmploymentStatus
enumTypes.summary: Current employment status of an employee
enumTypes.description: Indicates whether the employee is active, on leave, or has been terminated.

members.name: Active
members.description: The employee is actively working and receiving regular compensation.

members.name: Terminated
members.description: The employee's contract has been terminated. Historical records are retained.

actions.name: TerminateEmployee
actions.description: Initiates the termination workflow for the specified employee, setting the termination date and reason.

parameters.name: EmployeeId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the employee to terminate.

parameters.name: TerminationDate
parameters.description: The date on which the employment ends.

returnType.description: Returns the updated employee record with the termination date and final status.

functions.name: GetDirectReports
functions.summary: List direct reports of a manager
functions.description: Returns all employees who directly report to the specified manager, including their basic profile information.

parameters.name: ManagerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the manager whose direct reports are requested.

returnType.description: A collection of Employee records representing the direct reports.

actionImports.name: TerminateEmployeeImport
actionImports.description: Exposes the TerminateEmployee action via the entity container for client binding.

functionImports.name: GetDirectReportsImport
functionImports.description: Exposes the GetDirectReports function via the entity container.
